column3: Rehmannia Tea is a herbal beverage made from the roots of Rehmannia glutinosa, which are steamed and dried before being used to create a nutritious drink popularly used for treating various health issues.

Rehmannia Powder is a Chinese traditional medicinal remedy made from grounded roots of Rehmannia glutinosa, an herb known for its various health benefits which can help alleviate symptoms related to blood circulation and improve immune function.

Rehmannia Tincture is a herbal remedy made by extracting various plant compounds and their benefits through soaking in alcohol, commonly used for its numerous health advantages such as relieving fatigue, boosting immunity, and improving skin complexion.

Rehmannia Decoction is a traditional Chinese herbal remedy made by boiling down and concentrating roots, mainly those from the Rehmannia plant, into a potent liquid used for various health benefits such as relieving menstrual pain and promoting overall well-being.
Rehmannia Capsules is a traditional herbal remedy derived from roots and stem parts of a specific plant, packaged into convenient capsule form for easy ingestion and consumption.

Rehmannia Liquid Extract is a naturally sourced herbal supplement derived from the roots of Rehmannia glutinosa, an ancient Chinese medicinal plant, which has been utilized for its numerous health benefits and as a key ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine remedies for many centuries.

Rehmannia Tablets is a traditional Chinese medicine preparation made from dried roots of Rehmannia glutinosa plant, which are transformed into granules and then compressed into tablets for oral consumption.
Rehmannia Wine Infusion is a herbal beverage created by soaking dried Rehmannia glutinosa roots in wine, and typically used for its medicinal properties and refreshing taste.

Rehmannia Fresh Raw Form refers to the purest, most natural form of Rehmannia root, which has been harvested, washed and prepared without any processing or alteration to retain its potent nutritional benefits and traditional medicinal properties.

Rehmannia Dry Raw Form is a type of herbal medicine derived from the roots and stems of the Rehmannia glutinosa plant, usually used in its natural state without further processing to create health benefits through traditional Chinese practices.
